channel.title: Comments on: Newcastle Brown Ale, Ep. 104
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Newcastle
item.dc:creator: Newcastle
item.description:
Thanks for giving props to Newkie Brown. It is still my "budweiser" -- my everyday "working man's" beer.
I drink mostly American Craft brew now and Zero American Macros. Newcastle is still a somewhat affordable everyday drink. I haven't been able to find another beer cheaper that tastes this decent.
I seem to have a similar palate to David! I like malt English and Scottish styles and tend towards lower hops with caramel, toffee flavors.
item.content:encoded:
Thanks for giving props to Newkie Brown. It is still my “budweiser” — my everyday “working man’s” beer.

I drink mostly American Craft brew now and Zero American Macros. Newcastle is still a somewhat affordable everyday drink. I haven’t been able to find another beer cheaper that tastes this decent.

I seem to have a similar palate to David! I like malt English and Scottish styles and tend towards lower hops with caramel, toffee flavors.
